applock.title: Ship lock
applock.desc: Lock the vessel with a secret word

biometrics.title: Use yer eye or thumb
biometrics.desc: Unlock via yer fingerprint or face

allowRemoteContent.title: Allow remote cargo
allowRemoteContent.desc: Allow Ampersand to use the world's connection to fetch cargo, like images and avatars.

passwordAlert.text: Are ye sure? Write down yer secret word somewhere safe outside the ship, for if ye lose it, yer charts be lost forever! Export yer data before settin' one!
